creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/8a3c868ab4e66ace70367b0ba943a324841d9a63> (2022-02-24, cherry-picked from 6d17f2d) to releng/13.1 and stable/13 was: 

> freebsd-update.8: Document CreateBootEnv 

*     changing freebsd-update.conf.5
* not changing      freebsd-update.8

<https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/85436/> observes automated creation of snapshots of boot environments with FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE. 

So, CreateBootEnv should also be documented in releng/12.3 and stable/12.

(Will a simple MFC suffice? I don't know enough about 12.3 to tell.)

Thank you

----

⚙ D34169 freebsd-update.8: Document CreateBootEnv
<https://reviews.freebsd.org/D34169>
